clips.title: Two Moons
clips.prompt: Cinematic science-fiction film look, photoreal sci-fi, epic scale, atmospheric, subtle lens flares. Alien world. A high rocky ridge overlooking a vast alien valley of strange rock spires, two large moons in a violet sky. Dusk, otherworldly. A person in a sleek spacesuit stands on the ridge surveying the valley, helmet under arm. Dust, a planted beacon, distant haze. Cool alien dusk light, cinematic grade. 28mm, static wide. Epic sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Bridge
clips.prompt: Cinematic science-fiction film look, photoreal sci-fi, epic scale, atmospheric, subtle lens flares. Sci-fi future. A sleek starship bridge, a huge curved viewscreen full of stars, glowing consoles. Interior, calm. A person in a fitted uniform stands at the command rail watching the starfield, hands clasped behind. Holographic readouts, crew stations, soft glow. Cool blue bridge light with warm accents, cinematic grade. 35mm, slow dolly in. Commanding sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Artifact
clips.prompt: Cinematic science-fiction film look, photoreal sci-fi, epic scale, atmospheric, subtle lens flares. Alien world. A dim cavern housing a hovering glowing alien artifact, strange carvings, floating dust. Underground, mysterious. A person in an exosuit reaches slowly toward the glowing artifact, awed. A dropped scanner, glowing glyphs, mist. Cool artifact glow lighting the face, cinematic grade. 40mm, slow dolly in. Mysterious sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Cryo Wake
clips.prompt: Cinematic science-fiction film look, photoreal sci-fi, epic scale, atmospheric, subtle lens flares. Sci-fi future. A cryo bay, rows of frosted stasis pods, cold vapor rolling across the floor. Interior, cold. A person in a thin flight suit sits up from an open pod, breath fogging, disoriented. Frost, blinking pod lights, drifting vapor. Cold blue light with warm pod glow, cinematic grade. 35mm, slow dolly in. Tense sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Ringrise
clips.prompt: Cinematic science-fiction film look, photoreal sci-fi, epic scale, atmospheric, subtle lens flares. Sci-fi future. A quiet observation lounge, a huge window filled by a vast ringed gas giant. Interior, serene. A person in a flight suit stands at the window gazing up at the ringed planet. A handrail, a floating cup, soft cabin light. Warm planet-light with cool cabin fill, cinematic grade. 35mm, slow dolly in. Awe-struck sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Landfall
clips.prompt: Cinematic science-fiction film look, photoreal sci-fi, epic scale, atmospheric, subtle lens flares. Alien world. A landed shuttle on a lush alien jungle clearing, ramp lowering, exotic plants and giant fronds. Daytime, humid. A person in a survey suit walks down the ramp onto alien soil, looking around. Steam vents, glowing spores, a scanner. Bright alien daylight, cinematic grade. 28mm, crane rise. Adventurous sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Biodome
clips.prompt: Cinematic science-fiction film look, photoreal sci-fi, epic scale, atmospheric, subtle lens flares. Sci-fi future. A vast agricultural biodome on a red planet, rows of green crops under a glass dome, red desert beyond. Daytime. A person in a jumpsuit walks between the crop rows checking the plants. Irrigation lines, grow-lights, misting spray. Bright filtered dome light, cinematic grade. 35mm, side tracking. Hopeful sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Threshold
clips.prompt: Cinematic science-fiction film look, photoreal sci-fi, epic scale, atmospheric, subtle lens flares. Sci-fi future. A viewport chamber facing a swirling wormhole of light and color in deep space. Interior, tense. A person in a flight suit stands at the viewport watching the wormhole churn, awed. Reflections on the glass, console glow, star field. Cool wormhole light on the face, cinematic grade. 40mm, slow dolly in. Sublime sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Companion
clips.prompt: Cinematic science-fiction film look, photoreal sci-fi, epic scale, atmospheric, subtle lens flares. Alien world. A windswept alien desert of pale dunes under a huge pale sun. Daytime, harsh. A person in a travel-worn spacesuit walks beside a sleek humanoid android across the dunes. Footprints, blowing dust, a distant wreck. Hard pale sunlight, cinematic grade. 35mm, side tracking. Companionable sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Derelict
clips.prompt: Cinematic science-fiction film look, photoreal sci-fi, epic scale, atmospheric, subtle lens flares. Sci-fi future. A dark derelict spacecraft interior, dead consoles, floating debris, a flashlight beam cutting the gloom. Interior, eerie. A person in an exosuit sweeps a flashlight across the corridor, cautious. Frost, drifting particles, a broken panel. Harsh flashlight beam in deep black, cinematic grade. 35mm, handheld push. Eerie sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Star Map
clips.prompt: Cinematic science-fiction film look, photoreal sci-fi, epic scale, atmospheric, subtle lens flares. Sci-fi future. A dim command room, a large glowing holographic star map projected over a table. Interior, focused. A person in a uniform leans over the holo-table studying the star map, hand adjusting a node. Floating star systems, console glow, haze. Cool holographic glow on the face, cinematic grade. 40mm, slow orbit. Strategic sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Launch Day
clips.prompt: Cinematic science-fiction film look, photoreal sci-fi, epic scale, atmospheric, subtle lens flares. Near future. A launchpad at dawn, a tall rocket venting vapor, gantry towers, mist. Dawn, charged. A person in a flight suit walks toward the rocket carrying a helmet, resolute. Vapor plumes, floodlights, a crew walkway. Cool dawn light with warm floods, cinematic grade. 28mm, crane rise. Heroic sci-fi aesthetic, 24fps.
